_comment: Curated localized‚ÜíEnglish set links. TCGdex's Japanese/Korean/Chinese set ids and names do NOT bridge to English automatically (only ~2% share ids; counts/names diverge because English releases bundle or subset the Japanese originals). So the clean correspondences are listed by hand here: a TCGdex localized set id ‚Üí the English (pokemontcg.io) set NAME. Used to pair localized cards with their English set in mixed-language Pok√©mon/illustrator binders, and to interleave localized sets beside their English entry on /sets. ONLY clean correspondences are included; unmapped localized sets fall back to era-interleaving. Two Japanese sets can map to one English set (English bundles them). To extend: add `"<tcgdex-ja-id>": "<english set name exactly as pokemontcg.io spells it>"` as new sets release. Verified against live data 2026-06-13.
